sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25320" key="diamu/dhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαμύδησις</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n25320.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">decay, mortification,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
